tools.name: tab_racing_dates
tools.desc: Racing dates that have meetings (today, tomorrow, future), each linking to its meetings.

tools.name: tab_racing_futures_meetings
tools.desc: Futures racing meetings (ante-post / long-dated markets like Cup outrights).

tools.name: tab_racing_futures_race
tools.desc: Racecard for one FUTURES market: futures URLs put the race NAME (not a number) in the race slot, so the integer-typed tab_racing_race cannot

tools.name: tab_racing_jackpots
tools.desc: Current racing jackpot / carryover pools across meetings.

tools.name: tab_racing_meeting_races
tools.desc: The races for one meeting (by race type + venue code), each linking to its full racecard.

tools.name: tab_racing_meetings
tools.desc: All race meetings (thoroughbred/greyhound/harness) for a date, each with its races.

tools.name: tab_racing_next_to_go
tools.desc: Races about to jump across all codes, ordered by start time; each links to its racecard.

tools.name: tab_racing_race
tools.desc: Full racecard for one race: runners with fixed + parimutuel odds, form ratings, pools, bet types; results + dividends once run.

tools.name: tab_racing_race_form
tools.desc: Detailed form guide for one race (past performances, ratings, comments per runner).

tools.name: tab_recommendation_featured
tools.desc: Featured items for one recommendation category (e.g. Jockey Challenge, Racing Extras). 404s when the category isn't currently featured.

tools.name: tab_sport
tools.desc: One sport by name with its competitions. Also fronts the racing-adjacent pseudo-sports (Jockey Challenge, Racing Extras).

tools.name: tab_sports
tools.desc: All sports offered, each linking to its competitions (HATEOAS root for the sports tree).

tools.name: tab_sports_next_to_go
tools.desc: Sport events about to close, ordered by close time (next-to-go sports feed).

tools.name: tab_sports_results
tools.desc: Recently resulted sport events with final scores / settled markets.

tools.name: tab_trending_props
tools.desc: Trending sports propositions / bets across the book.

tools.name: unibet_kambi_call
tools.desc: Fetch a Unibet/Kambi sportsbook resource by operation name (market AU). The

tools.name: unibet_kambi_live_stats
tools.desc: Live in-event statistics (scores, match summary) for one Kambi event.

tools.name: unibet_kambi_odds_ladder
tools.desc: Kambi odds-ladder reference (the decimal-odds increments the book uses).

tools.name: unibet_racing_call
tools.desc: Call any of Unibet's persisted racing GraphQL operations against

tools.name: twitter_liking_users
tools.desc: Users who liked a given post.

tools.name: twitter_quote_tweets
tools.desc: Posts quoting a given post.

tools.name: twitter_retweeted_by
tools.desc: Users who reposted a given post.

tools.name: twitter_search_recent
tools.desc: Search posts from the last 7 days with X's query operators (e.g. '"Lakers" lang:en -is:retweet').

tools.name: twitter_trends
tools.desc: Trending topics for a location by WOEID (1 = worldwide, 23424977 = US, 23424748 = Australia, 23424975 = UK).

tools.name: twitter_tweet
tools.desc: One post by id.

tools.name: twitter_tweet_counts
tools.desc: Post volume over time for a query (last 7 days) — the cheap way to gauge buzz without reading posts.

tools.name: twitter_tweets
tools.desc: Batch post lookup by ids (up to 100) with engagement metrics.

tools.name: twitter_usage
tools.desc: This project's post-read usage against its monthly cap — check before burning quota.

tools.name: twitter_user
tools.desc: One account by numeric user id.

tools.name: twitter_user_by_username
tools.desc: One account's public profile by @handle (without the @).

tools.name: twitter_user_mentions
tools.desc: Recent posts mentioning an account.

tools.name: twitter_user_tweets
tools.desc: An account's recent posts (club announcements, insider news). Resolve the id with twitter_user_by_username first.

tools.name: twitter_users
tools.desc: Batch account lookup by numeric ids (up to 100).

tools.name: twitter_users_by_usernames
tools.desc: Batch profile lookup by handles (up to 100).
